ham.subject: Scheduled Azure Backup Completed 01-Feb-2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I want to inform you that the scheduled nightly backup of the Azure Virtual Machines in the Production environment completed successfully last night at 02:17 AM. All backup logs are archived in the shared repository '\\corp\cloud\backups'. No errors were recorded.

Key details:
- Start: 01-Feb-2026 01:45
- End: 01-Feb-2026 02:17
- Storage: 120GB
- Retention policy: 30 days

If you need to review the logs or have any questions, please reply to this thread or contact the Cloud Operations team.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
Samira Patel
Cloud Infrastructure Lead

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Outstanding Invoice
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your account has an outstanding invoice (Invoice #3245) for the January Cloud Services usage. The total amount due is $5,739.00 and is past the due date. Failure to pay within 24 hours will result in immediate suspension of your services and potential data loss.

To view and settle the invoice, please click the link below:

<URL>

Once the payment is confirmed, we will reactivate your account services.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Billing Enforcement Team
XYZ Cloud Services
